testcase.name: test_retirement_analysis_basic

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False is True + where False = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe931a21c440>('success') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe931a21c440> = {'error': 'Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 5.036145449999998, Max budget: 5.000999999999999', 'raw_input': 'Client age 55, wealth $2.5M, super $800K, retire at 65', 'success': False}.get
